gmcm_lookup_more_tooltip: Muestra más información sobre lo que está bajo el cursor dentro del menú del Navegador del Mundo.
gmcm_describe_guidance_tooltip: Muestra una notificación que describe brevemente la guía actual
gmcm_focus_more_tooltip: A controller will snap to more elements in the Navegador del Mundo menu
gmcm_other_options: There are additional in game options available within the Navegador del Mundo menu itself.
open_wn_with_keybind: Open Navegador del Mundo with the keybind: {{keybindString}}
Scrap_Paper_Description: It has some directions written on it.
attempting_to_find_directions: Attempting to find directions from {{start}} to {{destination}}...
attempting_to_find_directions_coordinate: Attempting to find directions from {{start}} to {{destination}} {{coordinates}}...
current_tile_is_not_reachable1: Tu casilla actual {{tile}} parece no ser transitable en una partida normal.
current_tile_is_not_reachable2: Si crees que debería considerarse transitable, repórtalo al autor del mod.
current_tile_is_not_reachable3: Puedes moverte a otra casilla del mapa e intentarlo de nuevo.
no_default_arrival_tile1: Note: The Ubicación {{name}} has no DefaultArrivalTile.
no_default_arrival_tile2: Como el jugador no está en esa ubicación, el mod seleccionará una casilla de llegada.
no_default_arrival_tile3: Nota: esa casilla podría estar en una parte inesperada o incluso aislada del mapa.
no_remote_starting_tile1: No se pudo encontrar una casilla inicial adecuada por la que el jugador pueda caminar.
no_remote_starting_tile2: Puedes intentar la búsqueda otra vez o, para un mejor resultado, ir a la ubicación y colocarte sobre una casilla transitable.
no_route_found1: \n--- No Ruta was found to travel from {{locationName1}} {{coordinates}} to {{locationName2}}{{optionalCoordinate}} via available methods of travel.
no_route_found2: Si crees que esto es incorrecto, compártelo con el autor del mod.
no_route_found3: Follow the instructions at https://smapi.io/log/ and share the result with your report to the mod author.
data_logged: Data has been added to your SMAPI log. You may upload your log to https://smapi.io/log/ and follow the steps on that page to share it.
go_direction_leave_small_map_and_go_with: En {{locationName1}}, avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction1}} y luego ve hacia {{direction2}} para llegar a {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_across_medium_map_and_go_wi: Avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction1}} a través de {{locationName1}} y luego ve hacia {{direction2}} para llegar a {{locationName2}}.
go_short_distance_and_go_with_distance: En {{locationName1}}, avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction1}} y luego ve hacia {{direction2}} para llegar a {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_in_large_map_to_section_wit: En {{locationName}}, avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction}} hasta {{section}} de {{locationName}}.
go_direction_and_leave_building_with_dis: Avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction}} en {{locationName1}} y sal hacia {{locationName2}}.
go_to_entrance_with_distance: En {{locationName1}}, avanza {{distance}} casillas hacia {{direction}} hasta la entrada de {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_leave_small_map_and_go: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_across_medium_map_and_go: Go {{direction1}} across {{locationName1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_short_distance_and_go: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_to_entrance: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction}} to the entrance to {{locationName2}}.
reason_edge_unusable_festival: There is a festival today so {{locationName}} is unavailable.
reason_edge_unusable_beforeopen: The door to {{locationName}} is locked until {{time}}.
reason_edge_unusable_friendship: You are not close enough friends with {{nameOfNPC}} to enter {{locationName}}.
reason_edge_unusable_busdriver: A bus driver is unavailable for travel to {{locationName}}
cross_bridge_to_use_navigator: Please walk back across the bridge to use the Navegador.
reached_destination: You have arrived at your destination
navigation_ended_tile_failed_walkable_ch: Navegación finalizada: la casilla {{tile}} no superó la verificación de transitabilidad en {{location}}.
navigation_canceled_non_walkable_tile: El jugador está sobre una casilla no transitable. El navegador se ha detenido.
active_navigation_failed_in_location: La navegación activa falló en {{location}} desde {{tile1}} hasta {{tile2}}
unable_to_guide_from_this_location: The Navegador is unable to guide from this Ubicación. Try returning to {{location}}.
navigator_paused_will_resume_later: The Navegador cannot function here and has paused. It will resume when it is able to do so.
travel_to_location_requires_specific_til: Para viajar a {{location}}, debes especificar una casilla.
tile_not_reachable_provide_a_different_o: La casilla {{tile}} en {{location}} no es alcanzable. Indica una casilla diferente.
navigation_canceled_unable_to_reach_tile: La navegación se canceló. No puedes llegar a la casilla ({{X}}, {{Y}}) en {{location}}.
no_route_there_now: El navegador no pudo encontrar una ruta hacia allí en este momento.
no_route_there_now_specific_location: El navegador no pudo encontrar una ruta hacia {{locationName}} en este momento.
navigation_canceled_npc_no_longer_in_loc: Navegación canceled: {{nameOfNPC}} is no longer in {{locationName}}
nagivation_canceled_npc_unreachable_mayb: Navegación canceled: {{nameOfNPC}} is unreachable (and possibly going to the void).
navigation_aborting_for_lag: Active Navegación is having difficulty around here - aborting as a precautionary measure.
navigation_aborted_error: An internal error occurred. Shutting down Navegador.
recalculating_route_unexpected: Algo salió mal. Recalculando ruta con datos de {{time}}
event_cannot_play_yet: The event cannot play right now, but may be available later
flood_fill_algorithm_abort: Flood fill algorithm in {{location}} is taking a long time. Aborting the process now.
menu_NPC_tooltip: Go to a villager or other NPC
menu_search_tooltip: Buscar una ubicación en el mundo.
menu_go_home_tooltip: Iniciar navegación guiada hacia la ubicación de tu casa
menu_poi_tooltip: Points of interest added by other mods. Current count: {{count}}
added_new_points_of_interest: Added {{count}} new point(s) of interest to Navegador del Mundo
menu_navigator_currently_location: The Navegador is currently guiding you to {{locationName}}.
menu_navigator_currently_section: The Navegador is currently guiding you to {{section}} of {{locationName}}.
menu_not_enough_money_notice: Warning: you do not currently have enough money to cover the cost of this Ruta ({{goldPriceString}})
menu_one_time notice_always_log: This is a one time notice! (It will continue to appear in your SMAPI log when appropriate, though)
menu_farmhouse_difficulty_notice: Note: Your Ruta involves the farmhouse. Navegador del Mundo may have difficulty navigating within the farmhouse, particularly if you use a custom farmhouse mod.\n\nThis notice can be Desactivado in the Opciones section of the Navegador del Mundo menu.
menu_farmhouse_difficulty_notice_shorten: Note: the Navegador may have difficulty guiding you in the farmhouse.
menu_search_interrupts_active_navigation: Warning: the Navegador is currently active - if you perform a search in this menu, the Navegador will end its current active nagivation task so that the search can provide accurate results.
menu_waiting: Type a search for a Ubicación above. You are currently in the Ubicación {{location}}. Buscar results will only include Ubicacións you can get to right now.
menu_may_take_seconds: Please wait, this may take a few seconds
menu_processing: Checking possible Rutas... Total potential results based on name matches: {{number}}
menu_guide_button_tooltip: Iniciar navegación guiada hacia {{locationName}} usando el navegador
menu_scrap_button_tooltip: Escribir indicaciones hacia {{locationName}} en una nota
menu_guide_button_tooltip_meet_npc: Iniciar navegación guiada hacia {{locationName}} usando el navegador para encontrar a {{nameOfNPC}}
menu_scrap_button_tooltip_meet_npc: Escribir indicaciones hacia {{locationName}} en una nota para encontrar a {{nameOfNPC}}
menu_higher_y: Y values increase to the south
menu_higher_x: X values increase to the east
menu_map_not_clickable: Tick the checkbox on the right to make the map Haz clicable
menu_quest_specialorder: This Misión has a drop box in {{locationName}}. The Navegador can guide you to the drop box.
menu_quest_location: This Misión requires that you visit {{locationName}}. The Navegador can guide you to there.
menu_quest_itemdelivery: Esta misión requiere que le entregues un objeto a {{nameOfNPC}}. Usa el submenú de NPC para obtener guía hacia un NPC.
menu_quest_lostitem: Esta misión requiere que encuentres un objeto perdido. El navegador puede guiarte hacia el objeto. Usa el submenú de NPC para recibir guía hacia {{nameOfNPC}}.
menu_quest_no_quests: You have no Misións that Navegador del Mundo can help with
menu_npc_all_tooltip: This will include in the list non-social NPCs as well as NPCs that do not appear in the Social tab of the game's menu until you meet them.
menu_npc_all_reminder: Can't find an NPC? Try the \"{{menu_npc_all_value}}\" checkbox above
menu_npc_please_filter_message: To view NPCs that you have not favorited, please type into the filter above to limit the current count of NPCs to {{maxCount}}. It is currently {{count}}. See the Opciones menu to change the threshold.
menu_npc_currently_in_but_will_go: {{nameOfNPC}} is in {{locationName1}} but at {{time}} {{nameOfNPC}} will start going to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_currently_in_but_on_the_way: {{nameOfNPC}} is currently in {{locationName1}} but is on the way to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_is_in_for_a_while: {{nameOfNPC}} is in {{locationName}} for the next few hours.
menu_npc_unable_to_enter_NPC_room: Note that you are unable to enter {{nameOfNPC}}'s room.
menu_npc_unable_to_enter_NPC_and_NPC_roo: Note that you are unable to enter {{nameOfNPC1}} and {{nameOfNPC2}}'s room.
menu_npc_where_meet: Would you like to try to meet {{nameOfNPC}} in {{locationName}}?
menu_npc_where_meet2: Would you like to try to meet {{nameOfNPC}} in {{locationName1}} or {{locationName2}}?
menu_npc_where_meet_unavailable: It seems like you are unable to meet {{nameOfNPC}} soon. Perhaps you can try again later.
menu_npc_go_anyway: Would you like to go there anyway?
menu_npc_go_there_or: You may go to {{locationName1}} anyway or go to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_socialize_quests: Talk to {{nameOfNPC}} to advance the {{questName}} Misión.
menu_npc_not_talked_to_tooltip: You have not talked to {{nameOfNPC}} today
menu_npc_greet_missing_notice: There are {{number}} NPC(s) who could not be found for the socialize/Introductions Misión. Did you uninstall a mod? Missing NPCs: {{list}}
menu_events_include_soon_events_tooltip: Only include events available now or in the next hour
menu_events_filter_tooltip: Filter events based on NPCs with Amistad requirements, NPCs who must be present, or Ubicación
menu_options_note_save_file: Note: unless otherwise noted, options set on this page are saved to your save file, not to a config.json
menu_options_set_home_location_tooltip: Set your home Ubicación in the Navegador to here
menu_options_reset_home_location_tooltip: Reset your home Ubicación in the Navegador to the front of your farmhouse (or cabin)
menu_options_show_farmhouse_route_notice: Mostrar aviso de ruta de la granja
Cuando una ruta implique viajar hacia la casa de la granja (pero no desde ella), mostrará un aviso sobre problemas que pueden ocurrir
menu_options_use_money: Allow money to be spent in Rutas
menu_options_use_money_tooltip: When unchecked, any form of travel that uses money will be ignored when creating Rutas
menu_options_avoid_zuzu_traffic: Try to avoid traffic in Downtown Zuzu
menu_options_avoid_zuzu_traffic_tooltip: The Navegador will try to keep you on the northern sidewalks (does not update immediately)
menu_options_check_restrictions_descript: These options may be useful for example if you have a mod that changes these restrictions and the Navegador cannot detect those changes
menu_options_check_restrictions_money_to: Si está marcado, el navegador comprobará si tienes suficiente dinero para usar una forma de viaje
menu_options_check_restrictions_doors_to: Si está marcado, el navegador comprobará las restricciones de hora y amistad de las puertas cerradas (son diferentes de las puertas de dormitorio)
menu_options_check_restrictions_bus_time: Si está marcado, el navegador comprobará las restricciones horarias del autobús de hoy
menu_options_color_walkable: Color de las casillas transitables en el menú de búsqueda:
menu_options_color_not_walkable: Color de las casillas no transitables en el menú de búsqueda:
menu_options_npc_menu_maximum_count_tool: Setting this too high can cause mouse movement in the NPC menu to lag
menu_options_sort_npc_alphabetical_toolt: NPCs will be sorted by name and not by Amistad
menu_options_keybind_header: Tecla rápidas to open the menu:
menu_options_keybind_lookup_more: Tecla rápidas for lookup more feature:
menu_options_keybind_describe_guidance: Atajo de teclado para describir la tarea de guía actual:
menu_options_keybind_note: The keybinds below are saved to a config.json file in this mod's folder and not to your save file. Haz clic the keybind to set it.
menu_options_keybind_not_set_note: Haz clic below and then enter a keybind when the prompt Abre
menu_options_report_bug: Need to report a bug or other issue? Enter \"worldnav log\" into the SMAPI console window and explain to the mod author what happened.
menu_options_option_change_requires_canc: Cambiaste opciones que pueden afectar cómo te mueves por el mundo, pero los datos actuales del navegador no incluyen esos posibles cambios. Debes cancelar (no recalcular) tu tarea de guía actual (Haz clic en {{buttonText}}) para que el navegador respete tus opciones más recientes.
scrap_doodle_description_fish: A doodle of a fish with air bubbles above it
scrap_doodle_description_treesky: A doodle of two evergreen trees with small blue particles above like rain
scrap_doodle_description_city: A doodle of a view above a few skyscrapers with the moon in the background
scrap_doodle_description_hilltop: A doodle of a hilltop with a few small, leafy trees on it
scrap_doodle_description_barrentree: A doodle of a barren tree with no leaves
scrap_doodle_description_palmtree: A doodle of a palm tree
scrap_doodle_description_shadowguy: A doodle of a shadow figure similar to Krobus
descriptive_quest_name_expander: {{questName}}. Haz clic para expandir, leer la descripción de la misión abajo y añadir botones del navegador a la derecha.
descriptive_enter_text_location_search: Enter text here to search for a Ubicación
descriptive_search_name_result: {{locationName}}. Haz clic para mostrar indicaciones abajo y añadir botones del navegador a la derecha.
descriptive_map_grid_image: Un mapa de la ubicación {{locationName}}. Puedes seleccionar una casilla específica marcando la casilla y usando los botones y deslizadores de la derecha.
descriptive_move_target_west: Mover objetivo una casilla al oeste
descriptive_move_target_east: Mover objetivo una casilla al este
descriptive_move_target_south: Mover objetivo una casilla al sur
descriptive_move_target_north: Mover objetivo una casilla al norte
descriptive_secret_image_partial_descrip: An image related to the secret
descriptive_time_condition_passed: It is currently within the event's time condition
descriptive_time_condition_failed: The event's time condition is not currently met
descriptive_npc_condition_failed: One or more NPCs are not in the Ubicación for the event
descriptive_select_event: {{locationName}}. Haz clic para seleccionar el evento y añadir botones del navegador a la derecha.
descriptive_set_walkable_color: Define el color de las casillas transitables en el mapa del menú de búsqueda. Selecciona el color a la izquierda.
descriptive_set_not_walkable_color: Define el color de las casillas no transitables en el mapa del menú de búsqueda. Selecciona el color a la izquierda.
descriptive_reset_walkable_color: Restablecer color de las casillas transitables en el mapa del menú de búsqueda
descriptive_reset_not_walkable_color: Restablecer color de las casillas no transitables en el mapa del menú de búsqueda
descriptive_poi_category_expander: {{poiCategoryName}}. Haz clic to expand to Mostrar points of interest below for this category.
descriptive_poi_select: {{poiElement}}. Haz clic para seleccionar este punto de interés y añadir botones del navegador a la derecha.
descriptive_guidance_local: Avanza {{countLocal}} casillas hacia {{direction}}. La siguiente ubicación está a unas {{countEnd}} casillas
descriptive_guidance_local_to_destinatio: Avanza {{countLocal}} casillas hacia {{direction}}. Tu destino está a unas {{countEnd}} casillas
